message:
test(graph): add comprehensive unit tests for graph module

Add 55 new inline unit tests:
- skills.rs (33 new): parse_meta, parse_list, quality_to_priority,
  skill_status, skills_to_issues edge cases, SkillMeta struct
- bv.rs (22 new): BvClient construction and builders, is_available,
  run_robot_raw errors, write_beads_jsonl variants, issue types

Total graph module tests: 60 (was 5)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
